source.clause_quote: You must not store ... full magnetic stripe data, card validation codes (CVV2, CVC2, CID), or PIN data

obligations.requirement: Projects integrating Stripe must not store prohibited cardholder data (full PAN magstripe, CVV, PIN).

check.prompt_template: This project imports the Stripe SDK. Judge whether it appears to store prohibited cardholder data (full magnetic-stripe data, CVV/CVC, or PINs). Flag a violation only with positive evidence of prohibited storage.

fix.guidance: Never persist CVV/PIN/full magstripe data; use Stripe tokens/PaymentMethods instead.
